publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-11-05 18:43:29 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Includes newspapers articles, running results, press notebooks, autographed posters, and a quilt made from running t-shirts.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Sherrer was a sports running journalist and a competitive track, and road racer in distances ranging from the mile to the marathon; she co-founded the Finger Lakes Runners Club Women's Distance Classic and served as the Finger Lakes Runners Club Newsletter editor for nineteen years. She promoted women's running and encouraged women's team participation.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes newspapers articles, running results, press notebooks, autographed posters, and a quilt made from running t-shirts.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Diane Sherrer collection, #4754. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
